zh.lifeSummary: 當Osmond Bassett de Centreville於大約0960年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Norman Bassett de Centreville47歲，母親Françoise Lesieure43歲。他於1004年與Satselina de Coutances在法國阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛貝瑟結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1007年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-頌享年48歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-巴瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Osmond Bassett de Centreville于大约0960年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Norman Bassett de Centreville47岁，母亲Françoise Lesieure43岁。他于1004年与Satselina de Coutances在法国阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛貝瑟结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1007年在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-頌享年48岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-巴瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Osmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th-century revival of an Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + mund ‘protector’. The name was also in use among the Normans and was borne by an 11th-century saint who was appointed to the see of Salisbury by William the Conqueror. As a modern given name it may be in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this name.

variants.name: Osmund
meanings: 19th-century revival of an Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + mund ‘protector’. The name was also in use among the Normans and was borne by an 11th-century saint who was appointed to the see of Salisbury by William the Conqueror. As a modern given name it may be in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this name.

en.lifeSummary: When Osmond Bassett de Centreville was born about 0960, in Normandy, France, his father, Norman Bassett de Centreville, was 47 and his mother, Françoise Lesieure, was 43. He married Satselina de Coutances in 1004, in Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1007, in Ouilly-le-Tesson, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osmond Bassett de Centreville est né environ 0960, à Normandie, France, son père, Norman Bassett de Centreville, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Françoise Lesieure, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Satselina de Coutances en 1004, à Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1007, à Ouilly-le-Tesson, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Osmond Bassett de Centreville um 0960 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Norman Bassett de Centreville 47 und seine Mutter Françoise Lesieure 43. Er hat 1004 in Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Frankreich Satselina de Coutances geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1007 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Ouilly-le-Tesson, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osmond Bassett de Centreville è nato il circa 0960 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Norman Bassett de Centreville, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Françoise Lesieure, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Satselina de Coutances nel 1004, nel Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1007, nel Ouilly-le-Tesson, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Osmond Bassett de Centrevilleが約0960年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Norman Bassett de Centrevilleは47歳，母Françoise Lesieureは43歳であった。1004年にフランスアクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンバセトでSatselina de Coutancesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1007年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスオウイリ-レ-テソンで48歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスオウイリ-レ-バセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Osmond Bassett de Centreville(이)가 대략 0960년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Norman Bassett de Centreville(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Françoise Lesieure(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1004년 프랑스 아키테인 로트-트-가니 배세트에서 Satselina de Coutances(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1007년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 우이리-레-츠손에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 우이리-레-바세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Osmond Bassett de Centreville nasceu aproximadamente 0960, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Norman Bassett de Centreville, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Françoise Lesieure, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Satselina de Coutances em 1004, em Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1007, em Ouilly-le-Tesson, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osmond Bassett de Centreville родился около 0960 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Norman Bassett de Centreville было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Françoise Lesieure, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Satselina de Coutances в 1004 г. в местности бассет, лот-ет-гаронн, аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1007 г. в местности оуилли-ле-тессон, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности оуилли-ле-бассет, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Osmond Bassett de Centreville nació aproximadamente 0960, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Norman Bassett de Centreville, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Françoise Lesieure, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Satselina de Coutances en 1004, en Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1007, en Ouilly-le-Tesson, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
